hook.summary: Fast-paced bingo stamping leading to a 'Double Bingo' win.
hook.visual_action: A hand stamps multiple numbers on a bingo card in rapid succession.

scene_flow: Hand stamps numbers on a bingo card matching the balls at the top.
A 'Double Bingo' banner appears with confetti and a celebratory sound.
Gameplay continues with even faster stamping on a different card layout.
A 'Mega Bingo' banner flashes on screen.
Final brand screen displays the game logo and various gameplay environments.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers, primarily women 35-65, who enjoy the rhythmic satisfaction of classic bingo games.
